title: Bitter Crispy Middle Eastern Onion Stir-fry
description: A low-fat-friendly monsoon dish featuring bitter and crispy onions with a hint of red chili flakes to add flavor and texture.
instructions: Chop the onions into thin slices, ensuring they are bitter and crispy.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add the vegetable oil.
Once the oil is hot, add the red pepper flakes and stir-fry for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the chopped onions to the skillet and sprinkle them with the balsamic vinegar.
Stir continuously to prevent sticking and to ensure even cooking. Continue cooking until the onions are crispy but not overcooked.
Remove from heat once they are golden brown and crispy, adjusting seasoning if needed.
